---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for the project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
For example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like. How should this feature work?

## Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions you've considered.

## Use Cases
How would this feature be used? Provide specific scenarios.

## Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I've searched for similar features
- [ ] This doesn't duplicate existing issues
- [ ] I've provided sufficient detail
